title: Asam Laksa
description: Asam laksa is a popular Malaysian rice noodle soup known for its tangy, spicy, and savory fish-based broth.

title: hainannese chicken chop
description: Hainanese chicken chop is a iconic Malaysian/Singaporean comfort food created by Hainanese cooks during British colonial rule.

title: Ramly Burger
description: A famous Malaysian street burger wrapped in egg, filled with beef or chicken patty, sauces, and vegetables.
